version.description: Semantic content version for this entity layout (e.g., 1.0.0).

map_id.description: Stable identifier for the map this entity set belongs to (e.g., beachdead, thebloodcount).

schema_version.description: Schema version string used to coordinate compatibility with tools (e.g., map_entities_v1).

spawn_points.description: Player spawn points for each team/zone, including fallback spawns.

id.description: Unique identifier for this spawn (e.g., spawn_team_red_01).

team.description: Optional team identifier (e.g., red, blue, attackers, defenders).

zone.description: Optional semantic zone name (e.g., Hub, Beach, NorthWing).

col.description: Grid column index for this spawn.

row.description: Grid row index for this spawn.

y_offset.description: Vertical offset relative to grid y_level (e.g., for roof or balcony spawns).

facing_deg.description: Initial yaw rotation in degrees for spawned players.

weapon_pickups.description: Weapon and ammo pickups placed in the map.

id.description: Unique identifier for this pickup (e.g., pickup_shotgun_altar_01).

weapon_type.description: Logical weapon identifier (e.g., Shotgun, Chainsaw, Bazooka).

ammo_amount.description: Amount of ammo granted on pickup, if applicable.

respawn_seconds.description: Respawn delay for this pickup; 0 for no respawn.

y_offset.description: Vertical offset relative to the grid y_level (e.g., on tables or platforms).

role_tags.description: Semantic tags for placement and behavior (e.g., altarroutepickup, centralhallpickup).

objective_pickups.description: Heavy-carry style pickups that serve as objectives (e.g., BloodVial, MoneyBag, GasCanister).

id.description: Unique identifier for this objective pickup (e.g., pickup_blood_vial).

objective_type.description: Logical type (e.g., BloodVial, MoneyBag, GasCanister, Egg).

heavy_carry_asid.description: ASID used for heavy carry behavior (e.g., ASID050).

respawn_seconds.description: Respawn time after being scored/consumed; 0 for single-use or script-driven respawn.

drop_on_death.description: Whether this objective is dropped when the carrier dies.

objectives.description: Static objective actors such as fences, eggs, ritual altars, vaults and capture zones.

id.description: Unique identifier for the objective (e.g., objective_ritual_altar_red).

objective_type.description: Logical type (e.g., Fence, RitualAltar, Egg, CaptureZone, Vault, GasTrigger).

team.description: Team that owns this objective, where applicable (e.g., red, blue, attackers, defenders).

max_health.description: Maximum health for destructible objectives (e.g., fences, eggs).

radius_cells.description: Optional radius in cells for area objectives (e.g., capture/control zones).

hazard_volumes.description: Hazard areas such as gas floors, acid pools, artillery zones, and fire-imp trigger regions.

id.description: Unique identifier for this hazard (e.g., HubFloorGas, ArtilleryZoneBeach).

hazard_type.description: Logical hazard type (e.g., FloorGas, SublevelAcid, Artillery, FireImpTrigger).

center_col.description: Grid column center for radial hazards.

center_row.description: Grid row center for radial hazards.

radius_cells.description: Radial extent of the hazard in grid cells.

min_y_offset.description: Lower vertical offset relative to grid y_level for volume bounds.

max_y_offset.description: Upper vertical offset relative to grid y_level for volume bounds.

grid_inclusion_rule.description: Optional rule description for inclusion based on tile role_tags (e.g., include all hazardzone tiles).

npc_spawners.description: Spawner definitions for zombies, aliens, Fire Imp and other NPCs.

id.description: Unique identifier for this spawner (e.g., spawner_zombie_centralhall).

npc_type.description: Type of NPC to spawn (e.g., Zombie, Alien, FireImp).

max_alive.description: Maximum concurrent NPCs from this spawner.

spawn_interval_seconds.description: Interval between spawn attempts in seconds.

activation_role_tags.description: Tags that must be active (e.g., bloodvialheld, hedgemaze) for this spawner to run.

meta.description: High-level map metadata useful for UI and validation.

supported_modes.description: List of supported game mode identifiers (e.g., BloodVialRun, TotalWar, BeachAssault).
